topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Incident Management. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for SRE Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Incident Management is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Incident Management in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in Incident Management
practiceQuestions: Write a program demonstrating Incident Management.

interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Incident Management?
How does Incident Management handle memory management?
advancedProjects: Integrate Incident Management into a microservice
Scale Incident Management for 10k concurrent users
companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about Incident Management
